title: tephrosia adunca
intro: Tephrosia adunca, also known as the curved spine pea or twisted pea, is a perennial legume native to the tropical regions of Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Tephrosia adunca typically involve drying the leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
